data.name: 夏多內羅曼史
data.detailed_description:
更新至第四章
往後依序更新（全部預計共七章）

遊戲開始時，除了有成人內容的「成人方案」外，也可以選擇不只是剪掉性表現的「乖寶寶方案」。
「乖寶寶方案」僅有日文版本。

*為了避免劇透，請不要直播或公開本遊戲從第三章開始的遊玩影片。
並且，對於直播或公開播放遊玩本遊戲的影片所造成的任何損害，製作團隊歉難負責。

　◆　◆　◆　◆　◆

正值初春季節。
開在冒險者雲集的小鎮中的小小旅舍「葡萄亭」因為某種原因而很出名。

「不喜歡的話就請直接找別家吧。會尊敬勇者大人的旅舍應該其他地方多著是啊」

「鎮上就只有我的旅舍絕對不讓勇者入住。抱持著這樣的信念營業著」

經營旅舍的青年・魯道夫，超級厭惡勇者。
偏偏突然有一天，一個失去記憶的勇者來到他這裡。

來歷不明的勇者費加羅（暫時的名字），難以置信地對魯道夫一見鍾情。
雖然魯道夫匆匆想要趕他出去，但如此這般之下，就變成是把他僱下來當旅舍的幫手了。

「我，想要留在這裡！ 就算是旅舍的幫手我也做！　請讓我留在這裡！！」

此外，魯道夫心中也一直有著某個煩惱。
那煩惱還把投宿的客人……嗜酒如命的開朗商人杰依、寡言的保鏢劍士凱諾斯，以及在隔壁開了藥房的魔法師納茲庫他們，都捲了進來。

再者，鎮上出名的無賴們，開始伸出魔爪。
勇者、借債、溫泉、春日祭、觸手、要守護的旅舍及家人……魯道夫的命運究竟會如何呢？

data.supported_languages: 英文, 繁體中文, 日文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows7
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows10

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X version 10.11

data.name: Chardonnay Romancia
data.detailed_description:
Updated up to Chapter 4,
after which chapters three through seven will be added in subsequent updates.

At the start of the game, you can select either the "Grown-ups plan," which features explicit content, or the "Good Kids Plan," for a more safe-for-work experience.
"Good Kids Plan" is only available in Japanese.

*To prevent spoilers, please refrain from posting gameplay videos of Chardonnay Romancia from Episode 3 and beyond.
Please note that this game contains content not suitable for minors, and this circle will not be held liable if your account gets into trouble from posting videos of this game online.

　◆　◆　◆　◆　◆

In an idyllic town frequented by Heroes, there is a small guesthouse called the Grapes Inn that's (in)famous for a particular reason:

"Feel free to find another place to stay if you can't comply with the terms.
I'm sure there are many other inns suited for Heroes like you."

"I won't change my mind. Even if my inn will be the only one that will never let Heroes stay in it."

Its innkeeper, a young man named Rudolf, absolutely detests Heroes!
But one day, through some twist of fate, a Hero lands on his doorstep.

This stranger, Figaro, explains that he has lost all of his memories. Not only that, one look at Rudolf has made him fall in love at first sight!
Rudolf desperately tries to drive the pesky Hero away, but circumstances force him to hire Figaro as his helper instead.

"But I wanna staaay! I can be your helper! Pleeeeease?"

The timing couldn't have been worse as Rudolf already had his hands full with his other guests:
Jey, a bibacious merchant, and Kinos, his taciturn bodyguard.To make things even more chaotic, Nazk, a young mage, just moved in to open an apothecary next door.

Furthermore, the threat of a notorious syndicate also looms on the horizon.
In this story of Heroes, debts, hot springs, festivals, tentacles, family, and an inn that must be rotected at all costs, what does destiny have in store for this poor innkeeper?

data.short_description: A furry visual novel for adults

Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows7
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows10
